display.purpose: Page titles only — the one large text element per screen.

body.purpose: Tree items, editor prose, search-hit titles.

label.purpose: Uppercase sidebar section labels (FAVORITES, PAGES) and calendar day heads only.

shadows.name: dialog
shadows.purpose: Search dialog floating over the scrim.

shadows.name: popover
shadows.purpose: Icon/cover pickers anchored to the page header.

motion.name: hover-reveal
motion.purpose: Row and header actions materializing on hover.

components.name: Tree Item
components.description: Sidebar page row; selection is a tone shift, actions appear on hover.
components.css: .ds-tree { background: var(--sidebar-bg, #f7f6f3); padding: 6px 0; width: 240px; font-size: 14px; color: #37352f; } .ds-tree-item { padding: 4px 8px; margin: 0 4px; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; } .ds-tree-item:hover { background: #eceae5; } .ds-tree-item.ds-selected { background: #e3e1dc; font-weight: 600; }

components.name: Chip Button
components.description: Small utility button in sidebar header and cover actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-chip { border: 1px solid #e6e4df; background: #fff; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 12px; padding: 2px 8px; color: #37352f; } .ds-btn-chip:hover { background: #f7f6f3; } .ds-btn-chip:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #2f80ed; outline-offset: 1px; } .ds-btn-chip:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: default; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Borderless control; hover paints a faint ink wash. Active tab darkens.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { border: none; background: none; padding: 4px 8px; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 13px; color: #37352f; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06); } .ds-btn-ghost.ds-active { background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08); font-weight: 600; }

components.name: Database Card
components.description: Board-view card: Paper on a tinted column, flat per the Float-Only Rule.
components.html:
In progress 2

Write design doc
Ship M2 sync
components.css: .ds-db-col { background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.03); border-radius: 6px; padding: 8px; width: 200px; } .ds-db-col-h { margin: 0 0 8px; font-size: 13px; color: #37352f; } .ds-db-count { color: #999; font-weight: 400; } .ds-db-card { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; border-radius: 4px; padding: 4px 8px; margin-bottom: 6px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 13px; color: #37352f; } .ds-db-card:hover { background: #f7f6f3; }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Borderless dialog input with a hairline bottom divider.
components.css: .ds-search-input { width: 320px; border: none; outline: none; padding: 14px 16px; font-size: 15px; border-bottom: 1px solid #eee; color: #37352f; background: #fff; } .ds-search-input::placeholder { color: #6f6e69; } .ds-search-input:focus-visible { border-bottom-color: #2f80ed; }

components.name: Section Label
components.description: The system's single sanctioned eyebrow: sidebar section headers only.
components.css: .ds-section-label { padding: 4px 12px 2px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #999; user-select: none; }

narrative.overview: OpenNote's interface is a desk with paper on it. The white content surface is the page you are writing; the faintly warm sidebar (#f7f6f3) is the desk it rests on. Everything you write is literally paper — a Markdown file in a vault you own — and the UI honors that: flat surfaces, hairline separations, quiet grays, and one Working Blue that appears only when something is selected or actionable. The chrome recedes; the document is the interface.
keyCharacteristics: Two-layer neutral scheme: white paper for content, warm desk gray for chrome
One accent (Working Blue) at well under 10% of any screen
Flat by default; shadows only on floating layers
Compact, refined controls that reveal themselves on hover
System font stack throughout — no display fonts, no font loading

rules.name: The Working Blue Rule
rules.body: The accent marks selection, links, and primary actions — nothing else. A screen with no selection and no actionable state contains zero blue pixels.

rules.name: The Two-Layer Rule
rules.body: Content lives on Paper; chrome lives on Desk. No third background tone is permitted, and the two always meet at a 1px Hairline.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: One font family, one text scale. A second family or a >34px size is forbidden.

rules.name: The Float-Only Rule
rules.body: If it doesn't float, it doesn't cast. Cards, board columns, and tables are flat; a shadow on a resting surface is a bug.

dos: Do keep Working Blue under 10% of any screen (The Working Blue Rule).
Do separate resting surfaces with 1px Hairline (#e6e4df) or the Paper/Desk split — never with shadow.
Do ship every control with hover, focus, active, disabled, and selected states; hover-reveal actions at 0.15s.
Do keep motion 150–250ms, ease-out, state-conveying only — nothing animates while the user is typing.
Do use native form controls; familiarity is the feature.
donts: Don't let "SaaS-gradient landing-page aesthetics" leak into the app — no gradient text, no glassmorphism, no hero metrics.
Don't build an "over-branded developer-tool dark UI — neon accents, terminal cosplay" when dark mode lands; dark surfaces stay warm and quiet.
Don't add decorative motion or page-load choreography.
Don't replace native scrollbars, selects, or inputs with custom controls.
Don't use color as decoration: blue backgrounds on inactive chrome, colored side-stripes (border-left > 1px), or full-saturation accents on inactive states.
Don't introduce a second font family, a third background tone, or an uppercase eyebrow outside sidebar section labels.
